positioning: Documentation-first field supplies for cautious wild-food foragers.

collections.name: Field Collection Kits
collections.description: Complete outing systems for mushrooms, berries, seaweeds, wild greens, workshop hosts, and no-eat practice walks.

collections.name: Specimen Handling
collections.description: Waxed paper bags, divided collection boxes, breathable harvest bags, trays, envelopes, and cooler inserts.

collections.name: Identification Support
collections.description: Hand lenses, folding rulers, color reference cards, spore-print papers, habitat cards, pencils, and notebooks.

collections.name: Carry and Protection
collections.description: Belt pouches, map sleeves, permit wallets, tick removers, marker tape, glove packs, first-aid sleeves, and rain covers.

collections.name: Sorting and Follow-Through
collections.description: Kitchen-safe sorting trays, quarantine labels, drying rack liners, brushes, harvest log binders, and meeting sample tags.

collections.name: Region and Season Bundles
collections.description: Seasonal replenishment for spring morels, autumn mushroom clubs, coastal tide-table gathering, hedgerow berries, and cautious beginners.

products.name: First Mushroom Walk Kit
products.summary: Starter kit for separating fragile mushroom finds, documenting habitat, measuring features, and preparing spore prints.

products.name: Berry & Bramble Harvest Kit
products.summary: A practical system for berry season with breathable bags, protective accessories, habitat cards, and sorting labels.

products.name: Coastal Seaweed Outing Kit
products.summary: Weather-aware coastal kit for carrying permits, maps, tide notes, mesh bags, and waterproof field notes.

products.name: Wild Greens Documentation Kit
products.summary: Documentation set for edible greens walks, focused on leaves, habitat notes, bag separation, and post-walk review.

products.name: Workshop Host Loaner Set
products.summary: Shared field supplies for mushroom clubs, wild-food workshops, and instructors who need repeatable loaner systems.

products.name: Divided Specimen Box Trio
products.summary: Three rigid divided boxes for keeping mushrooms, berries, greens, nuts, and dye plants from mixing in transit.

products.name: Waxed Paper Bag Refill Pack
products.summary: Individual bags for separating mushroom samples and preserving delicate identifying features.

products.name: Spore Print & Habitat Card Pack
products.summary: Cards for spore prints, habitat notes, substrate, nearby trees, weather, and collection time.

products.name: Hand Lens Field Pair
products.summary: Two pocket hand lenses with lanyards for cautious checks on gills, pores, stems, leaf edges, berries, and seaweed texture.

products.name: Permit Wallet + Map Sleeve
products.summary: Weather-resistant organizer for permits, collection limits, maps, tide notes, and workshop handouts.

products.name: Tick-Ready Field Accessory Pack
products.summary: Compact trail pack with tick remover, glove pair, marker tape, and a small first-aid sleeve.

products.name: Kitchen-Safe Sorting Tray Set
products.summary: Post-walk tray set for separated review, quarantine labels, drying rack liners, and cleaning brushes.

products.name: Spring Morel Scout Bundle
products.summary: Seasonal refill for spring scouting with wax bags, habitat cards, ruler, marker tape, and sorting labels.

products.name: Autumn Mushroom Club Bundle
products.summary: Club-meeting replenishment for shared walks, spore prints, sample tags, trays, lenses, and harvest logs.

products.name: Cautious Beginner No-Eat Practice Kit
products.summary: Documentation-only kit for learning habitat, separation, note-taking, and verification habits without consumption pressure.
